claim: AI agent capabilities are approaching human-level performance on specialized tasks, creating trillion-dollar opportunities in automation and knowledge work.
actionable: Identify knowledge work and automation opportunities in your domain where agents could provide ROI at scale.
source_title: Sequoia AI Ascent 2025: The Trillion-Dollar Opportunity

claim: The economic impact of AI is realized through deployment breadth across many use cases, not just a few high-value applications.
actionable: Build AI products with multiple use cases and integration points to maximize economic value extraction.
source_title: Sequoia AI Ascent 2025: The Trillion-Dollar Opportunity
